entry.title: New: BILL006(26) (Honolulu) — PUBLISH
entry.content:
RELATING TO DEVELOPMENT STANDARDS IN THE APARTMENT AND APARTMENT MIXED-USE DISTRICTS.

For apartment and apartment mixed-use zoning districts, reduces minimum lot area, reduces minimum lot width and depth, simplifies and increases maximum floor area ratio standards, amends the commercial floor area ratio maximum, and simplifies the maximum building area standard.

Latest action: Final reading notice published in the Honolulu Star-Advertiser.

View on the council site
